positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic jungle scene. The main elements include various geometric flora, highly stylized vines, and floating celestial bodies like crescent moons and rings of Saturn, arranged symmetrically around a central void. The style should be hyper-detailed geometric surrealism mixed with Art Deco aesthetics. Focus on strong, high-contrast silhouettes and clean vector lines. Color palette: deep indigo, rich midnight blue, electric neon teal, accented by burnt orange and starlight gold. Composition must be circular and balanced, perfect for a centered apparel graphic. The print should have crisp, solid color areas and glowing, ethereal outlines. Cinematic volumetric lighting, highly graphic, flat colors with gradient glows.
negative: blurry, noise, text, signature, watermark, artifacts, cropped, extra limbs, low quality, bad anatomy, messy, photographic, realistic, logo, trademark, copyrighted character
